a:T1813,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">State <strong>one</strong> similarity and <strong>one</strong> difference between the structure of genes and short tandem repeats.</p>
<p style="text-align: left;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">Outline the role of short tandem repeats in DNA profiling.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>b:T5d8,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;"><em>similarity</em>:</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">both made of DNA/nucleotides<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>both have bases/adenine/cytosine/guanine/thymine<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>neither has uracil ✔</p>
<p style="text-align: left;"> </p>
<p style="text-align: left;"><em>difference</em>: </p>
<p style="text-align: left;">genes are longer/have longer DNA/base sequences «without repeats»<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>genes have introns/exons but tandem repeats do not<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>genes have base sequences that code for polypeptides/proteins and tandem repeats do not ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">a. tandem repeats allow individuals to be distinguished/compared/identified<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>tandem repeats are used to identify the source of a DNA sample ✔<br/><br/>b. unique/different number of repeats/combination of tandem repeats in each individual<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>unique/different pattern of bands in each individual ✔</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">c. PCR used for copying/amplifying «tandem repeats» ✔</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">d. gel electrophoresis used for separation «of tandem repeats»/create pattern of bands ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/7/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","7"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"18N.2.HL.TZ0.3"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","2"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"18N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","7-1-dna-structure-and-replication"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
